name: Oat Bran Nutri-Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the order given into the bread pan.
2. Select white bread setting and press Start.
3. Makes 1 loaf, 8 slices. Each slice: 153 calories; 1 gm dietary fiber; less than 1 gm soluble fiber; 29 gm carbohydrates; 4 gm protein; 2 gm fat (12% of calories from fat); 1 mg cholesterol; 268 mg sodium; 74 mg potassium; 17 mg calcium.
